prompt: Edit this photograph. Keep the woman and her navy-and-white fine pinstripe sleeveless tiered maxi dress EXACTLY as they are: do not change, redraw, restyle or recolor the dress, its stripes, gathered neckline, ruched waist, tiers or hem, or her body, pose, hands, hair, face or black sandals. Preserve every fold and stripe precisely. Change ONLY the setting around her. Place her standing on a sun-warmed Cycladic terrace overlooking the deep blue Aegean: a low whitewashed wall behind her, a couple of terracotta pots, the sea beyond. Warm late-afternoon Mediterranean sunlight from one side, soft directional light, a realistic contact shadow grounding her where her feet meet the ground. Photorealistic, crisp natural focus throughout, a clean level realistic sea horizon, consistent warm light across the whole frame so she sits naturally in scene.
